capabilities.name: AI & Machine Learning for Supply Chain
capabilities.description: Applied AI for supply chain optimisation — demand sensing from external signals, anomaly detection in consumption patterns, intelligent replenishment, and predictive lead time estimation.

capabilities.name: Mobile and Multi-Device Access
capabilities.description: The solution works on phones, tablets, and desktops. Universal requirement — PSG asks every vendor "is this cloud and multi-device accessible?" as the first question on every sol cat. Warehouse staff need mobile access for receiving, picking, counting, and scanning on the floor.

capabilities.name: Data Security, Privacy & Consent
capabilities.description: Data hygiene, consent management (PDPA / GDPR), retention policies, audit trails, and basic access security. Universal — PSG requires every pre-approved vendor to meet PDPA compliance, Cyber Essentials Mark, and VA/PT audits regardless of which module they cover.

requirements.text: Encrypt data at rest using industry-standard encryption algorithms and encrypt data in transit using TLS or equivalent

proxy_refs: Compliant with PSG Cyber Essentials Mark baseline
